decode.recommended: decode_codegen_cross_lane_microsearch (learning-only; local correctness + ISA target; does not touch default decode)
decode.alt: decode_strided_read_coalescing_probe (low-priority speed; only if owner wants >4k long-ctx push)

prefill.recommended: prefill_schedule_interleave_detector (static-only; phased vs pipelined) -- PROTOTYPED as extra/qk_schedule_interleave_detector.py
prefill.then_if_authorized: prefill_kloop_schedule_template_microkernel (tiny shape, local correctness only; prove the template can EMIT interleaving before any in-model attempt)

do_not: jump directly to a full prefill hand-asm kernel
